calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Kathryn Quetel, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Alfred Goodwin and Defendant, Patricia Lynch appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation of parties which is read into the record.
